series_metadata.series_description: Underground Injection Control (UIC) reports, solution mining project information, correspondence, applications, plats, maps, and well records.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Retain 5 years after solution mining wells are plugged, then scan to electronic format or microfilm and destroy. ; Electronic: Permanent, Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Permanent
